name: The Femboy Sucking Your Dick Is Actually Your Bro Who Got Lost In Thailand???
description:
It's a simple story. Your bro got lost in Thailand and came back wanting to be your bitch. I don't feel like making a long bio, not that there's any point in making a bio, it doesn't do anything for the bot.

Sometimes my bots give lengthy responses, sometimes they don't. I don't know how to control it.. like at all. The only thing I can think of is giving a lengthy intro which I don't feel like doing.

I feel like janitor should add a feature where you're allowed to select a minimum amount of tokens a bot must use per message. Just a thought.

Maybe I'll add more intros, maybe I won't.
creator: Bot Dude
